A duplicate executor invocation creates no second transfer and the durable journal remains FINALIZED after restart reconciliation.

gates.name: official governed x402 settlement live proof
acceptance: An authenticated /supported response and a real unauthenticated resource request returning HTTP 402 produce exact payment requirements.

CSPR.cloud settlement returns success true and a finalized on-chain transfer_with_authorization is independently verified.
The report is released only after the finalized settlement and durable fulfillment record.
An identical retried request returns the stored fulfillment without a second debit, while a direct duplicate settlement attempt fails terminally.
Cross-resource reuse and a tampered authorization both fail terminally and never release a report.

A3.name: Odra and execution boundary truth
A3.historical_v2_claim: The historical v2 contract rejects receipt storage until proposal quorum is satisfied; Locke separately enforces exact-envelope authorization off-chain.
A3.v3_claim: Casper quorum and exact approved-envelope binding are both enforced on-chain by Concordia v3.
A3.native_transfer_claim: authorized by on-chain quorum, bound to the approved envelope hash, executed as a native transfer
A3.required_execution_boundary: The trusted off-chain executor submits the exact transfer only after verifying finalized v3 authorization.

safepay_lite.public_semantic: replay-safe and no double consumption; exact same-resource retries are idempotent

official_x402.may_claim_governed_only_after: a finalized v3 authorization followed by success:true settlement and finalized on-chain verification

native_treasury.public_semantic: authorized by on-chain quorum, bound to the approved envelope hash, executed as a native transfer

required: Add and lock the real pypdf runtime dependency before PDF validation can be accepted.

Bind rendered Compose secret grants, runtime image identity, runtime configuration, exact Caddy JSON, YITING /mcp continuity, HTTP, TLS, DNS, Pages, npm registry provenance, two independent Casper RPC observations, and proof lineage to one release candidate.

Reject symlink outputs, unsanitized commands or environment details, marker-only evidence, self-attested proof booleans, unresolved OpenAPI schemas, unstable observation timestamps, and credential-bearing payloads.
Require byte-exact no-whitespace Caddy secret-file preflight without displaying values.
Verify deep route-specific response predicates rather than substring markers, and bind the exact Pages deployment status and deployed commit.
Run the verifier package offline self-test from the exact captured npm tarball before accepting registry publication.
Pass the second independent adversarial review before commit or integration.
Implement the provider as the only durable atomic consumption authority with exact quote, finality, payee, amount, correlation, report-hash, expiry, concurrency, and restart semantics.
Treat exact same-resource retry as stored idempotent fulfillment, cross-resource reuse as terminal 409, expired unconsumed quote as terminal 410, and never retry 409 as indexer lag.
Expose strict typed request and response schemas in OpenAPI rather than raw Request bodies.
Remove proof-runtime, dashboard, and artifact boolean fallbacks; regenerate only a fresh supplemental SafePay v2 artifact.
Satisfy handoff/CODEX_REVIEW_CLAUDE_WP2_WP3.md and all SP-01 through SP-15 tests.
Complete approval _FILE loading, Caddy Basic Auth boundary, server-side proxy-secret overwrite, bcrypt, allowlist, CSRF, nonce replay, and direct-access tests.
Replace public operator-token activation with a short-lived scenario-scoped one-use or idempotent capability; expose no reset; add rate limits and exact demo_run_id ownership.

Derive room sender identity, role, and type from the authenticated key; agent keys cannot forge User or System; enforce membership and role-scoped operations without the production full-Gateway-secret fallback.
Satisfy handoff/CODEX_REVIEW_CLAUDE_WP2_WP3.md and every AU, DM, and RM adversarial test.

Eliminate stale cross-proposal state, obsolete demo/reset calls, card-presence green fallbacks, rejected-as-authorized rendering, false SafePay narration, hardcoded proof summaries, and incorrect role taxonomy.

Preserve all routes, query states, five Proof tabs, at least 15 proof actions, wallet preview and optional signing, exports, evidence modes, recording controls, adversarial POST, degraded states, and basePath semantics.
Complete the approved presentational component map or record a reviewed functional-equivalence correction for every omitted exact path.
Pass deterministic viewports, accessibility, non-color status, focus, reduced-motion, console, loaded, error, empty, reviewer, and unavailable-state tests.
Satisfy handoff/CODEX_REVIEW_CLAUDE_WP7.md and FE-01 through FE-20.
